title: Goan Prawn Curry Recipe | Goa में बनाया मैंने वहाँ की फेमस डिश | Goan Fish Recipe | KabitasKitchen
description:
Aaj main aapke liye lekar aayi hoon Goa ki sabse famous aur authentic Goan Prawn Curry Recipe. Is recipe ko maine bade hi aasan tarike se bataya hai taaki aap isse ghar par bilkul restaurant ya beachside shack jaisa bana sakein. Agar aapko seafood pasand hai, toh yeh traditional Goan fish/prawn curry aapki favorite ban jayegi!

Is curry ka asli maza iske homemade special Goan masala paste mein hai, jise hum fresh coconut aur spices ke sath taiyar karenge. Isse aap steam rice ke sath serve kijiye, yeh khane mein behad swadisht lagti hai.

Agar aapko aaj ki recipe achhi lage, toh video ko Comment, Like aur Share zaroor karein. Aur aisi hi simple aur tasty recipes ke liye mere channel KabitasKitchen ko Subscribe karna na bhoolein!

Location & Setup Courtesy: Palm grove Beach Resort, Goa

description:
#instantidlirecipe #kabitaskitchen #idlirecipe #ravaidlirecipe 

Idli or idly is a type of savoury rice cake, originating from the Indian subcontinent, popular as breakfast foods in Southern India and in Sri Lanka. It has gained popularity in other regions as well, traditionally Idli is made from rice. One of the popular variations of the Idli is rava Idli, the name comes from its primary ingredient rava(semolina). Rava Idli is easier to make and takes less time compared to rice Idli. In this recipe video I have show step by step process of making rava Idli


Preparation time - 30 minutes
Serving - 4

Ingredients:

Eno fruit salt - 1 tsp

Craving that creamy, aromatic, restaurant-style Thai Curry? Now you can make the BEST Veg Thai Curry right in your kitchen! I this recipe video I have shown simplest, yet most authentic वेज थाई करी रेसिपी (Veg Thai Curry Recipe) that is bursting with flavours and color.

In this video, I have covered everything you need to know, from making the perfect Thai Curry Paste (or the best store-bought option) to achieving that beautiful balance of sweet, sour, salty, and spicy. This recipe is naturally Gluten-Free and easily customisable with your favorite vegetables.

Learn the secrets to cooking with coconut milk to get that rich, velvety texture that rivals any Thai restaurant!
